diagnosis: Two-head ignore-index cross-entropy from GPT-J training. Oracle folds the entire decomposed view/split/clone/amax/sub/exp/sum/log/gather/mask/count/div graph into one scalar Triton kernel using online logsumexp accumulators. Inductor cannot recognize that materialized log-softmax rows are only consumed by one gathered negative log-likelihood per head. 1.63x real gap (3.9us absolute) indicates a new lowering pattern for small multi-head log_softmax+gather+xent.
